value:
Hello,

Thank you for reaching out, and I sincerely apologize for the delay in getting back to you on your case. I understand how frustrating it is to provide all the necessary documentation and then not hear updates—we appreciate your patience.

I'd like to help move this forward right away. Could you please confirm a few details so I can locate your case and get you a status update?

- Your case reference number (CAS19708536CB92N2)
- Your account or contact information

Once I have these details, I'll personally check on where things stand and make sure you get a prompt response from our team.

Thanks again for your patience, and I'm here to help.
